title: BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT - 211info
text: ACCENT NETWORK BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides business development services such as business plan workshops, record keeping, and other assistance for starting or growing a business. 12254 SW Garden Place Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Immigrants, refugees, and asylum seekers with a focus on Russian and Ukrainian population Hours: Monday/Wednesday 10am-8pm Email (971) 280-6738 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 280-6738 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Russian, Ukrainian AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 10am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On TriMet bus lines: -12, SW Barbur & Luradel stop -44, SW Capitol Highway & Huber stop -64 and 94, SW Barbur & Capitol Highway stop Services: Business Development * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees * Russian Community Business Development * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees * Ukrainian Community Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE ASSISTANCE PROGRAM LEGAL SERVICES - APPLICATION FORM ASSISTANCE PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - BASIC COMPUTER SKILLS CLASSES FOR SENIOR IMMIGRANTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ACCENT NETWORK
